# bytebase_workload_identity (Data Source)

The workload identity data source.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The workload identity name in workloadIdentities/{email} format.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) The timestamp when the workload identity was created.
- `email` (String) The workload identity email.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `state` (String) The workload identity state.
- `title` (String) The display title of the workload identity.
- `workload_identity_config` (List of Object) The workload identity configuration for OIDC token validation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--workload_identity_config))

<a id="nestedatt--workload_identity_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `workload_identity_config`

Read-Only:

- `allowed_audiences` (List of String)
- `issuer_url` (String)
- `provider_type` (String)
- `subject_pattern` (String)
